series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. These records provide proof of attempt of licensure/incomplete files for barber student applicants. May contain social security numbers, education information and birth certificates
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years from registration date, if not enrolled in barber school and

series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. Student Registration cards for inactive/lapsed barber students or barbers. Many of these individuals are not active and/or have never been licensed as a barber. May contain social security numbers.

As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. Inspection Reports for Barbershops and barber school facilities by Barber Inspectors. The report may contain facility name, facility ID#, facility address, phone#, owner name and names of barbers/instructors working in the facilities, including signature of owner and/or managing barber. Report also includes inspection findings and any incompliances. Facilities are required to post the most recent inspection report until next inspection.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year or until next inspection and destroy

series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. This series contains consumer complaints regarding a business or individual. Includes correspondences from consumer, Board office and offender/respondent.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years after investigation is complete, unless matter goes to hearing. If matter goes to hearing retain for 3 years after final appeal date.

series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. This series contains license renewal applications, may contain licensees name, address, signature, License ID#, compliance questions, instructors working, owners names, email addresses and signatures.

As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. This series contains monthly report of student''''''''s hours as required from private and Institutional Barber Schools to verify attendance and hours earned towards completion of course program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until course is completed. All hours must be completed within 5 years or student begins losing training hours ; Electronic: Continually maintained and updated until course is completed. All hours must be completed within 5 years or student begins losing training hours

series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. These records provide proof of licensure for barbershops. These files may contain names, addresses, id numbers, signatures, change of ownership applications, change of name applications, remodel applications, and any violations/Board orders. Files mainly contain applications to own a barbershop in the State of Ohio and any correspondence between the Board and the barbershop.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain as long as license is active or current application is superseded by a new application for same location/address or license becomes inactive for a period of 5 years. When application is superseded destroy all correspondences from previous owners as well. License ID numbers are reused for same address/location.

series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. Inactive/Lapsed Licensee files provide proof of licensure of Inactive/lapsed barbers. File may also serve as reference to action taken by the Board, including but not limited to reinstatements, violations and any discipline.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 20 years after inactive/lapsed and destroy
